title: Workers for Platforms

Wrangler commands for managing Workers for Platforms [dispatch namespace](https://developers.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-for-platforms/workers-for-platforms/how-workers-for-platforms-works/#dispatch-namespace) using Wrangler. Run as if Wrangler was started in the specified directory instead of the current working directory
